text.title: Burn Review — Output Contract
text.summary: Shape of the weekly review note and decision-log entries.

forbidden.pattern: attendees missing any of architect / oncall_lead / product_rep
review note committed > 2h after meeting end
two consecutive weeks with reviews skipped without recorded cancellation reason
architectural_decisions item without an owner or follow-through plan
recontract_candidates not surfaced to product within 1 week of being raised

allowed-transformations.transformation: Extend the agenda with up to 2 portfolio-specific items (e.g. multi-tenant capacity) — do not remove the five standard items.
Reduce review to 15 min in weeks with no burn activity, but still walk all five items.
Defer an item to the following week; the deferral itself is logged as a decision.

list.item: Review held within the week's scheduled slot (or cancellation logged)
Open architectural decisions have owners and follow-through
